title: Abd al-Malik's Banquet at al-Khawarnaq
description: ('Umar b. Shabbah] also mentions that Abd al-Malik, having killed Mus'ab and entered al-Kiifah, ordered a great deal of food prepared and brought to al-Khawamaq, 702 and issued a general invitation. So the people entered and took their seats. When `Amr b. Hurayth al-Makhzumi703 entered, `Abd al-Malik said, "Come to me, and sit on my couch." And he seated him with him.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 21
